rows.label: tev017501_MSG0001
rows.name:
My professional specialty was in
outer space mineral research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017501_MSG0002
rows.name:
But as a hobby, I used to process stones, make
accessories out of them, and sell them locally.
I was actually somewhat well-known for that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017501_MSG0003
rows.name:
It didn't take long before I was making more money
at my hobby than my real job. So when we arrived
here on Mira, I started the business up again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017501_MSG0004
rows.name:
But then I discovered Mira has minerals that are
harder than diamonds. Now I'm researching Mira's
minerals so I can learn to work with them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017501_MSG0010
rows.name:
That Shingo kid told me about a Ma-non
craftsman named Jeshero who was able
to process the minerals he found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017501_MSG0011
rows.name:
I went to see him ASAP and
came away impressed. Those
Ma-non really are incredible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017501_MSG0012
rows.name:
They can freely work any mineral as if it was
clay, no matter how hard it actually is. And they
do so without causing a single imperfection![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017501_MSG0013
rows.name:
The moment I saw that, I asked Jeshero to
let me apprentice under him. Now he's
teaching me all sorts of crazy things! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017501_MSG0014
rows.name:
The next time you see that Shingo kid, tell
him to come find me. I'll make whatever he
wants out of any rock he throws my way.[ST:wait ]
